title: Onion Uttapam from Batter

subs.name: rava (semolina) batter — mix 1 cup rava + 1 cup curd + water to pouring consistency; rest 20 minutes
subs.notes: instant rava uttapam for when there is no fermented batter

subs.name: capsicum + corn for a no-onion version
omit if not available
subs.notes: onion alone is the classic topping

steps.text: Mix onion, green chilli, tomato, coriander leaves, and cumin together in a small bowl. Taste the batter and adjust salt if needed — the topping is raw, so season the batter well.

Heat a tawa on medium. Drizzle a few drops of oil and wipe with a paper towel. Pour a large ladle of batter (about 80 ml) and spread it gently into a 15 cm circle — do not spread as thin as dosa; uttapam should be about 7–8 mm thick.
Immediately scatter a generous portion of the onion topping over the wet batter surface. Press lightly with the back of the ladle so the topping embeds into the batter.
Drizzle 0.5 tsp oil around the edges. Cook on medium for 3–4 minutes until the bottom is golden and the edges look set and start to lift. Tiny bubbles will appear on the surface.
Flip carefully with a flat spatula and cook the topping side 2 minutes until the onion softens and picks up a little colour. Serve hot with coconut chutney or sambar.

cross_contact_notes: Ingredient metadata cannot prove an allergen-free kitchen. Check packaged labels and cross-contact statements for your products.
trust.provenance_summary: AI-assisted original draft; declared licence original.
trust.substitution_warning: A substitution can introduce allergens or change dietary suitability. Never claim a swap is safe without checking the replacement's label and the user's allergy context.

substitution_notes: idli-dosa-batter → rava (semolina) batter — mix 1 cup rava + 1 cup curd + water to pouring consistency; rest 20 minutes (instant rava uttapam for when there is no fermented batter); onion → capsicum + corn for a no-onion version (equally colourful and tasty); tomato → omit if not available (onion alone is the classic topping)
